title: Debug assertion fts5CheckTransactionState: Assertion `iSavepoint<=p->ts.iSavepoint' failed
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts4(c0);
key_bug_features: DROP TABLE vt1 triggers assertion error in fts5
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt2 USING fts5(c0 TEXT, c1 INTEGER, c2 REAL);
INSERT INTO vt2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES('test', 1, 1.1);
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt3 USING fts4(c0 TEXT, c1 INTEGER);
